title: AdventureMC
description: A fully-featured Minecraft instance geared towards the AdventureMC 1.21 server. Contains mods, resource packs, and shader packs, plus configurations. Biased towards exploration and redstone playstyles. Client-side.
body:
A fully-featured Minecraft instance geared towards the AdventureMC 1.21 server. Contains mods, resource packs, and shader packs, plus configurations. Biased towards exploration and redstone playstyles. Client-side.

Bliss Shaders by X0nk:
[https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)

Stay True by haimcyfly:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

Vanilla Tweaks by Stridey:
[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
